reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in machine-readable packet evidence bundle: focused packet-flow tests cover eval, report, review, evidence, optimize, proposal, and revision artifact schema versions and command defaults.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered by packet-flow tests when adding, renaming, or changing eval, report, review, evidence, optimization, proposal, or revision artifact schemas.
